title: Territorial jurisdiction; East Carroll Parish
doc_html:
§2605.  Territorial jurisdiction; East Carroll Parish

The territorial jurisdiction of the justice of the peace court in East Carroll Parish shall be the parish boundary.  

Acts 1987, No. 141, §1.

§2605.  Territorial jurisdiction; East Carroll Parish

Acts 1987, No. 141, §1.
